note: Honest relevance benchmark for the Atlas ranker. Queries are phrased the way a coding agent would ask, deliberately avoiding the asset's own title tokens where possible, so the fielded ranker (intent/alias/behavior/proximity + ontology) is tested against a naive substring baseline rather than a title-copy match. All assets are copy-mode react so the --framework filter is exercised; ranking quality is independent of reuse mode. Graded relevance: relevant=2, acceptable=1, everything else=0.

draft.title: Reviewable queue table
draft.summary: A dense approval list that keeps the reviewer's place across a run of batch decisions.

intent.userJob: let a reviewer approve many items in a row without losing their place

draft.title: Assistant side panel
draft.summary: A persistent conversation column that keeps proposal cards and tool activity beside the work.

intent.userJob: keep a persistent assistant next to the artifact so proposals appear alongside the work

draft.title: Change preview
draft.summary: A side-by-side that shows exactly what a proposed edit will do before anyone accepts it.

intent.userJob: show what a change will do before it is applied so the user can accept or reject

draft.title: Blocked run notice
draft.summary: Surfaces a run that could not continue and offers a safe way back without losing progress.

intent.userJob: recover a run that got stuck and resume from preserved state without losing progress

draft.title: Data freshness indicator
draft.summary: Shows whether the underlying sources are fresh and complete before the user trusts a result.

intent.userJob: indicate whether the underlying data is fresh and complete so the owner can trust the answer

draft.title: Waterfall bridge
draft.summary: Decomposes a single figure into the contributing causes that moved it from start to end.

intent.userJob: visualize how a number decomposed into the contributing causes that moved it

draft.title: Guided first step
draft.summary: Meets a first-time user and helps them state the outcome they want before anything is generated.

intent.userJob: guide a first-time user to state their goal before any work begins

draft.title: Slide filmstrip
draft.summary: A vertical filmstrip for moving between the slides of a deck and reordering them.

intent.userJob: navigate between the slides of a deck and reorder them

draft.title: Accepted versions list
draft.summary: Lists the canonical accepted versions so the user can return to an earlier one.

intent.userJob: let the user return to an earlier accepted version of the artifact

draft.title: Nothing-yet panel
draft.summary: A calm placeholder shown before any content exists, pointing at the one first action.

intent.userJob: show a calm screen when there is nothing yet and point at the first action

draft.title: Sticky bottom bar
draft.summary: Keeps the current primary action reachable at the bottom of a small screen.

intent.userJob: keep the main action reachable at the bottom of a phone screen

draft.title: Present mode
draft.summary: Full-screen controls for showing a finished deck to an audience.

intent.userJob: present a finished deck full screen to an audience

queries.terms: let an operator sign off on many transactions quickly without losing their place
persistent assistant panel that keeps proposals beside the work
show what an edit will do before it is applied
get a stuck run moving again from where it left off
tell the owner whether the numbers are up to date and complete
break a figure into the causes that moved it
help a new person say what outcome they want on arrival
move between the slides of a presentation and rearrange them
go back to a previously accepted revision
calm screen with one call to action when nothing exists yet
keep the primary button reachable on a phone
show a completed deck to a room full screen
